tooltips.response_time: Average time a contact waits for a response per message
tooltips.waiting_time: Average wait time for support chat start
tooltips.awaiting_service: Contacts waiting for support chat start

conversations_dashboard.title: Conversational

info.description: Conversational data shows conversations started up to 24 hours before the current time. More recent conversations are still being classified and are not displayed. Refresh the dashboard to update the data window.
info.mock_description: These numbers are for demonstration purposes only. Once the first widget is configured, real data will be displayed here.

tooltips.total: Total conversations started in this period. A conversation is counted 24 hours after the contact's first message.
tooltips.resolved: When the agent demonstrates competence and provides useful service
tooltips.unresolved: When support chat wasn't effective (greetings, out of scope, agent errors)
tooltips.unengaged: Conversation without useful engagement. This includes greetings or emojis only, or cases closed without relevant interaction.
tooltips.transferred: Conversations requiring human support. Numbers may differ from the human support dashboard, as this counts conversations (not rooms) that were opened and went through AI. As the same conversation can generate multiple rooms, some of which may be opened directly by human support, comparing the dashboards isn't recommended.

generate_insight.title: Generate insight
generate_insight.error: Couldn't generate insights. Check your internet connection and try again later.
generate_insight.prompt: Analyze the performance of a dashboard showing human support results. The dashboard displays three main categories: in progress, closed, and waiting. Additionally, evaluate these metrics: first response, wait time, and interaction time. Identify efficiency patterns and possible bottlenecks in the support flow, and offer suggestions to optimize response time and team productivity. Data: {values}

tooltips.average_time_chat: Average total conversation time from the beginning of the support chat with the representative until it was closed

news.title: News and updates in Analytics - Live desk

monitoring.first_text: Monitor real-time support chat interactions, identify bottlenecks, and make quick decisions to optimize operations. Explore the new Monitoring view.
monitoring.second_text: You can now monitor the status of support chats in real-time:
monitoring.third_text: You can monitor time metrics —average and maximum wait times, time to first response, and duration— in real-time:
monitoring.fourth_text: The detailed monitoring table lets you track real-time data for each interaction and agent.
monitoring.fifth_text: You can monitor each interaction through the In progress and Waiting tabs. Click interactions to view them.
monitoring.sixth_text: The Representative and Breaks tabs let you monitor the metrics of each agent per interaction, as well as custom breaks.
monitoring.seventh_text: In the Representative tab, you can click each agent to enter view mode or use the button to disconnect them.

analysis.first_text: Explore closed interactions to discover patterns and trends. Identify improvement opportunities and boost team performance. Explore the new Analytics view!
analysis.second_text: Now you can track all closed support chat metrics: Average wait time, Average time to first response, Average response time, and Average support chat duration.
analysis.third_text: This detailed analytics table allows analyzing data per interaction and agent.
analysis.fourth_text: You can review each closed interaction in the Closed tab. The Representative and Breaks tabs let you analyze the metrics of each agent per closed interaction, as well as custom breaks within the filtered period.

data_feedback.title: Share your experience using the Conversational AI Dashboard
data_feedback.description: Considering your experience with this dashboard, indicate how much you agree with the statements below:
data_feedback.q1: I trust the data presented in this dashboard.
data_feedback.q2: The data in this dashboard helps me make decisions.
data_feedback.q3: With this dashboard, I can understand the impact (ROI) of AI conversations on business results.
data_feedback.textarea_label: What could we improve about this dashboard? (optional)
data_feedback.textarea_placeholder: Share suggestions to improve clarity, trust, or usefulness of the data.
data_feedback.toast_postponed: Feedback saved for later. You can respond at another time.

mcp_news.modal_title: Analytics, now available in AI tools!
mcp_news.modal_description: The MCP securely connects your Analytics data to AI tools like ChatGPT, Claude, Cursor, and more to explore insights using natural language.
mcp_news.flow_prompt: "Which topics did the AI struggle with the most?"
mcp_news.feature_ask_questions: Ask questions about your data in natural language
mcp_news.feature_track_metrics: Track CSAT, NPS, and conversation performance instantly
mcp_news.feature_prepare_reports: Prepare reports and generate custom dashboards
mcp_news.privacy_note: Only data you have access to is available through MCP.
